page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place the performance of the ecs.g5ne.xlarge in the lower tiers. The Intel Xeon 8163 processor achieves a single-core stress-ng score of 1102.59 and a multi-core score of 2912.92, both categorized in the bottom 25%. Memory performance is similarly constrained, with uncached large-block read bandwidth at 19.5 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 18.08 GB/sec. Computational benchmarks, such as Geekbench single-core (914.0) and multi-core (1989.0), reflect poor performance characteristics, particularly in image and text processing.

From a resource density perspective, the instance offers a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, making it a standard general-purpose option. However, the older CPU architecture and lower memory bandwidth present a significant performance-per-resource tradeoff. It is best suited for lightweight workloads such as basic web serving, development environments, or low-throughput database operations where high-performance computing is not required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, but lacks local storage and GPU acceleration. Network performance is limited to a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates that the instance operates in the lower performance tiers, with a single-core Geekbench score of 914.0 and a multi-core score of 1989.0. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, yielding 19.5 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. Given these performance limitations, the ecs.g5ne.xlarge is best suited for low-intensity workloads, such as basic web serving, development environments, and lightweight database operations that do not demand high computational or memory throughput.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, suited for lightweight workloads.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose instance with balanced memory and compute resources, designed for lightweight utility workloads and development environments.

16.0 GB of system memory with a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization on x86_64 architecture
Suited for lightweight web serving and development environments
